title: Adding and Simplifying Commands
description: Adds commands like /dimension and simplifies others like /gmc for creative mode.
body:
**This mod aims to add useful QoL commands or simplify existing ones! Some I have added so far:**



**Added Commands:**

/fly     allows a player in the Survival or Adventure gamemodes to fly and removes all fall damage.

/dimension     changes the dimension of a certain player. Arguments: /dimension [End, Nether, Overworld.]



**Simplified Commands:**

/gamemode     Simplified: /gmc (Creative), /gms (Survival), /gma (Adventure), /gmsp (Spectator)

/give @s command block     Simplified: /commandblock OR /cb



**That's all for now! Please let me know of any commands you would like me to add or simplify!**
